name: Tikit
overview: A journey by bus went wrong, when Salek & Atabor accidentally murders their next-seat passenger out of greed. A lottery ticket evokes other passenger’s luring greed which leads to chaos one after another. After the twisted tragedy, the lottery ticket will conclude its winner & victim.

trailers.title: TIKIT| Official Trailer | Chorki Original Series | Siam | Safa | Manoj | Sentu | Vicky
